backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target/release level remains at 17.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add release configuration to maven-compiler-plugin to use the java.version property.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incorrect bytecode if the compiler plugin does not target Java 21.
